# HobbyClub Copy Plan

## Scope
- `index.html` only

## Tone
Fun and casual — like a club talking to its members.

---

## Hero Tagline
Replaces the lorem ipsum paragraph under `<h1>HOBBYCLUB</h1>`.

> A place for people who are into things.

---

## Hobby Cards

### KNITTING
> From beginner scarves to complex patterns.

### MODELS
> Kits, figures, rockets — build something with your hands.

### CINEMA
> Films worth watching twice.

### GAMING
> Retro to current, casual to competitive.
